visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A male host wearing a gray newsboy cap, glasses, and a pink shirt under a green jacket holds a vibrant orange smartphone mock-up. The camera focus is tight on the phone's back, revealing three large camera lenses and a sleek matte finish. (2) The man unboxes the device from a white package, revealing a white charging cable inside. He gestures with his hands, which are adorned with wooden beads, highlighting the phone's central logo and the triple-lens array on the top rear of the device. (3) The scene shifts outdoors to a park with trees and people blurred in the background. The man stands in the center as camera zoom examples (1x, 2x, 4x) are shown, demonstrating the simulated photographic depth and clarity of the device's lenses. (4) A group selfie scene in an indoor room shows the man with three other individuals (one male, two females). The screen displays yellow tracking boxes around their faces, demonstrating an "auto-centering" front camera feature as they move and pose for the camera. (5) Back in a studio setting, the man holds three packaged Apple-branded accessories including cases and a lanyard. He demonstrates attaching a magnetic leather wallet to the back of the orange phone case, followed by showing a shoulder lanyard attached to the phone. (6) The final shot shows the man leaning over a glass display counter in a bright retail store. Behind him are shelves stocked with various smartphone boxes from brands like vivo and realme, and he points toward the camera with a wide smile.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: 3ctim. [Logo]: miko 米可手機館. [Subtitle]: iPhone 17 Pro Max 全系列. [Variety]: 噴配!. (2) [Subtitle]: 含配件開箱. (3) [Subtitle]: 手機本體三鏡頭. (4) [Subtitle]: 4800萬畫素. (5) [Subtitle]: MagSafe 充電最快達到25W. (6) [Subtitle]: 有線充電 40W. (7) [Subtitle]: 先來看照片. (8) [Variety]: iPhone 17 Pro Max 1X. (9) [Variety]: iPhone 17 Pro Max 2X. (10) [Variety]: iPhone 17 Pro Max 4X. (11) [Subtitle]: 再來 前鏡頭大更新!. (12) [Subtitle]: 1800萬畫素. (13) [Subtitle]: 而且支援 人物居中. (14) [Variety]: 人物移動時，畫面會跟隨並居中. 人物分開時，畫面會自動拉遠 盡可能讓所有人在畫面中. (15) [Subtitle]: 看照片!. (16) [Variety]: iPhone 17 Pro Max 前鏡頭. (17) [Subtitle]: A19 Pro處理器 電池續航可以達到 39小時. (18) [Subtitle]: 這三款新的原廠配件 超搭!. (19) [Subtitle]: 裝上去 吸上去 還有 掛繩喔!. (20) [Logo]: miko. [Subtitle]: 推薦大家 買手機到米可!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim) appearing throughout, 3 other people (1 male, 2 females) appearing in the group selfie demonstration.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main character is a middle-aged male with glasses, wearing a light blue newsboy cap, a pink shirt, and a light green utility jacket.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The backgrounds change from a clean indoor studio with wooden tables to an outdoor park with lush green trees and a white architectural building, and finally a well-lit mobile phone retail shop with glass counters and stock-filled shelves.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy electronic pop music starts immediately with a strong, 128 BPM beat. A male narrator introduces the "iPhone 17 Pro Max" with a bright, energetic tone. There is a faint sound of plastic rustling as boxes are handled. (2) A sharp "ding" sound effect plays simultaneously with text overlays appearing on screen. The narrator's pitch remains high and engaging while detailing camera specifications. The background music maintains a consistent driving rhythm with synth textures. (3) A subtle mechanical click is heard as a phone is placed in its case. The narrator transitions to discussing battery life and charging tech. The audio is extremely clean with negligible ambient noise, indicating professional studio vocal tracking. (4) Faint natural outdoor ambient noise (wind floor) is briefly audible during the park scene. Three distinct, stylized camera shutter sound effects trigger with each zoom level photo shown, punctuating the visual rhythm. (5) The narrator's voice becomes more animated as he describes the AI centering feature. Electronic synth pads swell. Faint background chatter of three other people is heard during the group demonstration segment. (6) A "whoosh" transition sound leads into the final hardware accessory discussion. A metallic "snap" sound effect occurs when a magnetic wallet is attached, followed by a series of high-frequency clicks during assembly. (7) The video concludes with a loud, high-arousal call-to-action recommending the "miko" retail store. The electronic BGM reaches a peak in volume before a clean fade-out at the final frame.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Technical Specs -> Feature Demonstration -> Accessory Ecosystem -> Commercial Call-to-Action.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase the rumored or speculative features of the iPhone 17 Pro Max (likely using a dummy model or concept) and to promote the miko mobile phone retail store in Taiwan.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly mentions 'miko 米可手機館' multiple times through logos, speech, and a final visit to the retail store location.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a fast-paced social media editing style with bright colors and upbeat music to maintain high engagement while presenting technical information.
